purpose: Explicit, documented allowlist of legacy STATIC public HTML that predates the data-model-driven publication pipeline. These files are hand-authored (no data-generated-source marker) and are not represented in the publication data model. Institutional QA quarantines them from MODEL-DRIVEN checks (expected-artifact set, generated-content markers, cross-model link/title checks) so it does not conflate legacy static content with generated output. QA still fully validates all non-allowlisted files, and any NEW public HTML that is neither generated-from-model nor listed here is still flagged. This makes the classification explicit rather than suppressing the check; it does not delete files. Known deferred issues in this corpus (e.g. broken Volume II data links, a duplicate title shared by standard.html and citizen-standard.html) remain unresolved pending migration or removal and are documented, not silently fixed.
